WELL.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of WELL is 108 nm.

WELL.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of WELL is 54 nm.

WELL.A.1B.rule: Minimum enclosed area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.

WELL.GATE.EX.2.rule: Minimum vertical extension of WELL past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) that does not interact with SRAMDRC, is 7 nm

FIN.W.1.rule: Exact vertical FIN width is 7 nm.

FIN.W.2.rule: Minimum horizontal FIN width is 108 nm.

FIN.S.1.rule: Exact vertical FIN pitch is 27 nm.

GATE.W.1.rule: Exact horizontal GATE width is 20 nm.

GATE.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical GATE width is 40 nm.

GATE.S.1.rule: Exact horizontal GATE pitch is 54 nm.

GATE.S.2.rule: Minimum horizontal GATE spacing is 34 nm.

GATE.S.3.rule: Every GATE (not cut by GCUT and not interacting with the layer SRAMDRC) must have at least one other GATE within 54 nm of its surrounding along the horizontal axis. The spacing being the distance between centers of the two GATE layer polygons.

GATE.AUX.2.rule: GATE may not be discontinuous along the vertical axis. Use GCUT layer to mark cuts in the GATE.

GATE.ACTIVE.AUX.3.rule: ACTIVE layer vertical edge may not lie inside, or coincide with, the GATE layer.

GATE.ACTIVE.EX.1.rule: Minimum vertical extension of GATE (not cut by GCUT) past ACTIVE is 4 nm.

GATE.ACTIVE.EX.2.rule: Minimum horizontal extension of ACTIVE interacting with GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) past GATE (not cut by GCUT layer) is 25 nm.

GATE.ACTIVE.S.4.rule: Minimum horizontal spacing between ACTIVE and GATE (not cut by GCUT and not interacting with ACTIVE) is 9 nm.

ACTIVE.FIN.EX.1.rule: Minimum vertical extension of ACTIVE past FIN is 10 nm.

ACTIVE.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of ACTIVE layer is 27 nm.

ACTIVE.W.2.rule: ACTIVE layer vertical width increment is an integer multiple of 27 nm.

ACTIVE.W.3.rule: Minimum horizontal width of ACTIVE is 16 nm.

ACTIVE.S.1.rule: Minimum vertical spacing of ACTIVE is 27 nm.

ACTIVE.S.2A.rule: Minimum horizontal spacing between ACTIVE layers forming source/drain regions (of different transistors) on different nets is 92 nm.

ACTIVE.S.2B.rule: Minimum horizontal spacing of ACTIVE is 38 nm.

ACTIVE.WELL.S.4.rule: Minimum spacing of ACTIVE (outside the layer SRAMDRC) to WELL is 27 nm.

ACTIVE.WELL.EN.1.rule: Minimum enclosure of ACTIVE (outside the layer SRAMDRC) by WELL is 27 nm.

ACTIVE.A.1A.rule: Minimum area of an ACTIVE layer polygon that does not interact with the layer SRAMDRC is 864 nm-sq.

ACTIVE.A.1B.rule: Minimum enclosed area of an ACTIVE layer polygon that does not interact with the layer SRAMDRC is 864 nm-sq.

ACTIVE.AUX.1.rule: ACTIVE must always be enclosed by NSELECT or PSELECT, such that no ACTIVE layer edge(s) coincide with NSELECT or PSELECT layer edge(s).

ACTIVE.AUX.3.rule: A notch in ACTIVE along vertical axis is not allowed.

ACTIVE.LUP.1.rule: Maximum distance, to prevent latch-up, between ACTIVE forming a MOS device and ACTIVE forming a bulk/substrate contact within the same WELL/substrate is 30 um.

GCUT.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of GCUT is 17 nm.

GCUT.S.3.rule: Minimum vertical spacing between two GCUT layer polygons is 35 nm.

GCUT.AUX.1.rule: GCUT layer may not exist without the layer GATE.

GCUT.AUX.2.rule: GCUT layer vertical edge may not lie inside, or coincide with, the GATE layer.

GCUT.AUX.3.rule: GCUT may not interact with channel.
